title: [PR] feat(cli): pull latest LLM models dynamically in the crew wizard
summary:
## What & why

The JSON-crew creation wizard (`crewai create`) hardcodes a short model list per provider. Vendors ship new models every few weeks, so that list goes stale fast. This adds a resolver that prefers **live** model data and keeps the hardcoded list only as a verified fallback.

## How it

title: [PR] fix(integration-engine): sample template-var child fields at discovery
summary:
## Problem (verified empirically)
A **template-var child** object — one whose API path nests under a parent, e.g. `/orgs/{OrgId}/events` — resolves its parent IDs through `LoadParentIDs`, which reads the **synced** DB (`RunView` on the parent's MJ entity). At **discovery** time nothing is synced yet
